LegalBody.dmcaSummary: Aiuiso respects intellectual property rights. If you believe your copyrighted work has been infringed, please send a DMCA notice to our agent. We will promptly remove the material.
LegalBody.privacySummary: We collect basic account info and usage data to improve services. Your data is encrypted and never sold. By using Aiuiso, you consent to our practices.
LegalBody.tosSummary: By accessing Aiuiso, you agree to these terms. Users must be 18+ to access adult content. We reserve the right to suspend violating accounts.

DMCA.p1: Aiuiso respects the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond promptly to any claim that content posted on our website infringes copyright or other intellectual property infringement.
DMCA.takedownP1: If you believe in good faith that any content hosted on Aiuiso infringes your copyright, please provide our Copyright Agent with the following written information:
DMCA.takedownL1: A physical or electronic signature of a person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of an exclusive right that is allegedly infringed.
DMCA.takedownL2: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed, or, if multiple copyrighted works at a single online site are covered by a single notification, a representative list of such works at that site.
DMCA.takedownL3: Identification of the material that is claimed to be infringing or to be the subject of infringing activity and that is to be removed or access to which is to be disabled, and information reasonably sufficient to permit us to locate the material (e.g., the exact URL).
DMCA.takedownL4: Information reasonably sufficient to permit us to contact you, such as an address, telephone number, and, if available, an electronic mail address.
DMCA.takedownL5: A statement that you have a good faith belief that use of the material in the manner complained of is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law.
DMCA.takedownL6: A statement that the information in the notification is accurate, and under penalty of perjury, that you are authorized to act on behalf of the owner of an exclusive right that is allegedly infringed.
DMCA.contactP1: Please send your complete DMCA takedown notice to our designated copyright agent via our Contact page or directly by email at:
DMCA.counterP1: If you feel that your content that was removed (or access to which was disabled) is not infringing, or that you have the authorization from the copyright owner, you may send a counter-notice containing the necessary details to our Copyright Agent.
DMCA.note: Note: We will terminate the accounts of repeat infringers in appropriate circumstances.

PrivacyFull.intro: Welcome to Aiuiso. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you how we look after your personal data when you visit our website.
PrivacyFull.s1P1: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together as follows:
PrivacyFull.s1L2: Technical Data: IP address, browser type and version, time zone setting, and operating system.
PrivacyFull.s1L3: Usage Data: information about how you use our website, including your watch history and interactions.
PrivacyFull.s2P1: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances:
PrivacyFull.s2L1: To register you as a new user.
PrivacyFull.s2L2: To deliver relevant website content and advertisements to you.
PrivacyFull.s2L3: To use data analytics to improve our website, products/services, marketing, customer relationships and experiences.
PrivacyFull.s3P1: You can set your browser to refuse all or some browser cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies. If you disable or refuse cookies, please note that some parts of this website may become inaccessible or not function properly.
PrivacyFull.s4P1: This website may include links to third-party websites, plug-ins and applications. Clicking on those links or enabling those connections may allow third parties to collect or share data about you. We do not control these third-party websites and are not responsible for their privacy statements.
PrivacyFull.contactPrompt: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please

TOSFull.s1P1: By accessing and using the Aiuiso website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. In addition, when using this website's particular services, you shall be subject to any posted guidelines or rules applicable to such services.
TOSFull.s2P1: To use certain features of Aiuiso, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and restricting access to your device. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account or password.
TOSFull.s3P1: You must be at least 13 years old to use this platform. If you are under the age of majority in your jurisdiction, you must use this site only with the involvement of a parent or guardian. Some content may be age-restricted and you agree not to attempt to bypass these restrictions.
TOSFull.s4P1: Aiuiso acts as an index and hub for video content. We highly respect the intellectual property rights of others. For more information on how to report copyright infringement, please visit our
TOSFull.s5P1: You agree not to use the site to:
TOSFull.s5L1: Upload or share content that is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, or hateful.
TOSFull.s5L3: Send junk email, spam, or duplicative/unsolicited messages.
TOSFull.s5L4: Interfere with or disrupt the security of the website or connected networks.
TOSFull.s6P1: Aiuiso reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to terminate your access to all or part of the site with or without notice for any reason, including violation of these Terms and Conditions.
